dotfiles.notes: Source of the canonical sync skill; shares only the sync skill itself. Regenerates with `bash scripts/rulesync.sh`.

omni-notify.notes: Downstream consumer of @micthiesen/mitools; origin of the upkeep skill.

resources.notes: Shared shape only (sync remote -> survey -> research majors -> apply -> verify -> ship). Steps are environment-specific: omni-notify has a frontend workspace, Dockerfile, and LLM model IDs; mitools is a published library whose CI publishes to npm on a version bump. Port procedure improvements, never the project-specific steps.
